name: CVF Governance Persona Skill Boundary Review
owner: CVF multi-agent role and handoff governance surface
purpose: Review multi-agent or persona-like requests so skills, personas, commands, roles, fan-out, and merge decisions stay under CVF-owned handoff and review control.
useWhen: A request, external skill, or worker packet uses persona, command, or skill concepts that might blur CVF role authority or orchestration ownership.
doNotUseWhen: The work uses ordinary CVF role routing with no persona, command, skill, fan-out, or merge boundary issue.
executionConstraints: metadata-only candidate; does not spawn agents, create personas, install commands, or alter handoff runtime
acceptanceEvidence: future promotion requires repeated boundary-defect evidence and reviewer proof
authorityCeiling: metadata-only boundary guidance; cannot authorize persona orchestration or command execution
permissions: read metadata and cited governed source artifacts only
rollback: delete this registry entry and regenerate the skill index if reviewer rejects AGSK-T7
safeStop: if persona, command, or skill authority is ambiguous, stop and require CVF role/handoff owner decision
capabilityBoundary: no persona creation, no agent spawning, no command import, no runtime orchestration, no package activation
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to spawn agents, execute commands, or bypass the handoff contract
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not authored in AGSK-T7
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in AGSK-T7
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required for metadata-only candidate
